DISCOVERY 610, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANT'S RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, CONTENTION INTERROGATORIES, AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS; AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS. ARGUED. THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: 1. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED AS TO MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANT'S RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES DENIED, BASED ON RECENT SERVICE OF RESPONSES BY RESPONDING PARTY. 2. MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANT'S RESPONSES TO CONTENTION INTERROGATORIES DENIED AS TO CONTENTION INTERROGATORIES #1 - #68. MOTION OFF CALENDAR AS TO REMAINDER OF CONTENTION INTERROGATORIES, TO BE RESET IF NECESSARY AFTER PARTIES MEET AND CONFER. 3. MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANT'S RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS. OFF CALENDAR, TO BE RESET IF NECESSARY, AFTER PARTIES MEET AND CONFER. 4. REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS DENIED. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion And Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant'S Responses To Plaintiffs' Form Interrogatories, Contention Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-17-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Vincent J. Scotto, III, Esq. and Jennifer Scotto, Esq. (925/372-0667), appearing for plaintiff / moving party
Philip T. Emmons, Esq. of JOSEPH COSTELLA & ASSOCIATES 925/945-4491, appearing for defendant / opposing party Toter Incorporated

RULING:
Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Defendant's Responses To Form Interrogatories, Contention Interrogatories, And Request For Production Of Documents; And Request For Monetary Sanctions. Argued. The Court ruled as follows:
1. Tentative ruling adopted as to Motion To Compel Defendant's Responses To Form Interrogatories denied, based on recent service of responses by responding party.
2. Motion To Compel Defendant's Responses To Contention Interrogatories denied as to Contention Interrogatories #1 - #68. Motion off calendar as to remainder of contention interrogatories, to be reset if necessary after parties meet and confer.
3. Motion To Compel Defendant's Responses To Request For Production Of Documents. Off calendar, to be reset if necessary, after parties meet and confer.
4. Request For Monetary Sanctions denied.
COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. Not reported.
